_comment: Pattern file for Docker image deploy hints. Add new patterns here without touching code. Restart required to reload.

_hint_types.deployable: Ready to deploy as-is — has an embedded server process
_hint_types.needs-sidecar: Requires a reverse proxy or additional container to serve HTTP
_hint_types.cli-tool: Command-line tool — no long-running server process, pod will exit immediately
_hint_types.build-image: Build or development image — not intended for production workloads
_hint_types.base-os: Base OS or language runtime — no application server embedded

tagPatterns.reason: PHP FastCGI Process Manager — requires nginx/Apache reverse proxy to serve HTTP
Command-line tool — no long-running server process, pod will exit immediately
Command-line tool variant — not a server
Software Development Kit — build/dev image, not intended for production deploy
Java Runtime Environment — base runtime, no app server
Development variant — not intended for production
Windows Server Core — not compatible with Linux K3s nodes
Windows Nano Server — not compatible with Linux K3s nodes

imagePatterns.reason: Base OS image — no application server embedded
Base OS image (Debian Linux)
Base OS image (Alpine Linux)
Base OS image (CentOS)
Base OS image (Fedora)
Base OS image (Rocky Linux)
Base OS image (AlmaLinux)
Base OS image (Amazon Linux)
Base OS image (Oracle Linux)
Node.js runtime — base image without application server, build your app on top
Python runtime — base image, no app server embedded
Go build environment — intended for multi-stage builds, not production deploy
Ruby runtime — base image without web server
PHP runtime — base image without web server (use php-apache or a framework image)
OpenJDK — Java runtime/build image, deploy a packaged JAR/WAR instead
Eclipse Temurin JDK — Java build/runtime image
Amazon Corretto JDK — Java build/runtime image
Rust toolchain — build image, not intended for production deploy
Elixir runtime — base image without Phoenix/Plug server
Erlang runtime — base image
Scala build environment
Clojure build environment
Swift toolchain — build image
Dart SDK — build image
Perl runtime — base image
R statistical computing environment — not a web server
PHP Composer dependency manager — build/CI tool, not a server
Apache Maven — Java build tool
Gradle — Java/Kotlin build tool
Ansible automation tool — not a web server
BusyBox — minimal Unix utilities, base image
Empty base image — for building minimal containers
